native.query:
SELECT
  toStartOfHour(occurred_at) AS time,
  action,
  count() AS alert_count
FROM alert_log
WHERE occurred_at >= now() - INTERVAL {{time_range}}
GROUP BY time, action
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  definition_name,
  count() AS fire_count
FROM alert_log
WHERE occurred_at >= now() - INTERVAL {{time_range}}
  AND action = 'fire'
GROUP BY definition_name
ORDER BY fire_count DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT
  occurred_at,
  action,
  definition_name,
  device_name,
  entity_key,
  current_value,
  message
FROM alert_log
WHERE occurred_at >= now() - INTERVAL {{time_range}}
ORDER BY occurred_at DESC
LIMIT 500

dashboard.name: Alert History
dashboard.description: Alert trends, noisy rules, and raw alert log from ClickHouse
